title: cynodon dactylon subsp. arcuatus
intro: Cynodon dactylon subsp. arcuatus, also known as a type of grass, is a subspecies of the common couch grass or Bermuda grass, characterized by its curved or arched growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cynodon dactylon subsp. arcuatus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal properties, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal preparations.
